__comment: Sample rubric configuration. Copy to rubric.json and edit to bias the LLM scoring toward what matters to you. All four weights should sum to ~1.0 (but the code will normalize if they don't).
focus_areas: Describe what matters most to you. Example: 'I have 10 years in .NET and Python. Looking for senior engineering roles in fintech or AI/ML. Prefer hands-on coding over pure management.'

__schema_help.skills_weight: How much tech stack match matters (0.0 - 1.0).
__schema_help.domain_weight: How much industry / product area familiarity matters.
__schema_help.focus_areas: Free text appended to the LLM prompt to bias scoring toward what you care about.
